stories.headline: EU approves €90bn loan for Ukraine and fresh Russia sanctions – Europe live

stories.headline: Business Costs Surging Amid Iran War, Says JPMorgan Strategist

The Composite PMI compiled by S&P Global declined to 48.6 in April from 50.7 the previous month, dropping below the 50 threshold separating growth from contraction. stories.headline: Teck Warns of Higher Fuel Costs From Mideast Energy Shock

stories.headline: American Airlines Lowers Outlook on Rising Fuel Costs
stories.summary: American Airlines announced it expects $4 billion in additional expenses due to rising jet fuel prices but plans to raise fares to offset these costs, maintaining some of the price increases even if fuel prices return to prewar levels. Siddharth Philip has more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: How Kevin Warsh Is Distancing Himself From Trump
